Dialog.name: MND_TBOX_MEDAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s[n]I have is {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}. Using {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}{f 0 1 27} should open it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TBOX_MEDAL_OPEN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I used {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}{f 0 1 27} of my {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s,[n]so now I have {f 2 4 3} left.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TBOX_MEDAL_NOT_ENOUG
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I had {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}{f 0 1 27} {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s, I could[n]open it, but I only have {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27} right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TBOX_MedalNone
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't have any {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}s[n]on hand. It looks like I need {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}{f 0 1 27} to open it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TBOX_RETURN_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I don't sense any more treasure chests here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's still dangerous, so please try to come back as soon as you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TBOX_OPEN_TUTO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20523 0 0}That looks like it'll be useful. It's up to you to decide how to use it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1ST_TRY_MEDAL_OPENED
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4607 0 0}Ah, I thought that's what that was.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}That's a {f 0 1 39}Twilight Fragment{f 0 1 27}. They can be used on devices throughout Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}You might find more in Tartarus or other locations with traces of Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}If you come across any going forward, you'll want to take them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_TEMPERANCE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the Temperance Major Arcana[n]card can now appear during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_DEVIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the Devil Major Arcana card[n]can now appear during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_TOWER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the Tower Major Arcana card[n]can now appear during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_STAR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the Star Major Arcana card[n]can now appear during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_MOON
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the Moon Major Arcana card[n]can now appear during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_SUN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the Sun Major Arcana card[n]can now appear during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_GET_CARD_JUDGEMENT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems the Judgement Major Arcana[n]card can now appear during Shuffle Time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}It looks like a dead end. Do you want to head back right away?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Be careful on your way back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ESCAPE_FUKA_11
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Oh, do you think you might have missed something?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Well, there are no enemies left, but it's still dangerous.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Please be careful if you're going to keep exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_ARAGAKI_REMIND
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This would've looked good on Aragaki...[n]but he isn't here anymore...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5071 0 0}It looks like what the chairman gave you before, doesn't it, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's apparently really rare. I'm surprised to see it in a place like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TUTO02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe the owner of the antique shop could[n]craft it into a piece of equipment for me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_TUTO03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It looks like you've seen everything here. Good job.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I think it's a good time to leave now. Please exit back out the door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_EQUIP_UPDATE_HERO_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 4 1 0 1 0}...[n]Looks pretty good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_YUKARI_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}Hey, that's a nice-looking bow! I can use it, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_JUNPEI_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Yo, that weapon looks beastly! But it'd take a real master like me to make good use of it, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_SANADA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}Oh, a new weapon, huh? It looks even better than what I'm using right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4086 0 0}Ah, that looks like a fine weapon. Would you mind if I used it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_FUKA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5087 0 0}Oh, there was a weapon inside. I think Koro-chan would be able to use that one well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_AEGIS_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6080 0 0}New armaments acquired. It appears to be an upgrade. I propose a retrofit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_ARAGAKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9007 0 0}Well, what do we have here? You should let me use it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_AEGIS_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6087 0 0}Oh, we have acquired new armaments! May I use it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_EQUIP_UPDATE_HERO_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 4 1 0 1 0}...[n]Seems pretty good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_YUKARI_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}Ooh, that looks great! Whaddaya say? Can I use it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_JUNPEI_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Hey, sick armor. I think it'd help bring out my inner charm, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_SANADA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3094 0 0}I think this armor would suit me well. Mind if I use it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4086 0 0}What a splendid piece of armor. I imagine it'd be more effective than what I'm currently using.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5087 0 0}Oh! Don't you think that armor would be perfect for Koro-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_AEGIS_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6080 0 0}It appears to be a defensive article. I recommend allowing me to equip it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_AMADA_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7005 0 0}Um, could I use that new armor? Even if it doesn't fit now, I'll definitely grow into it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_ARAGAKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9007 0 0}Hey, that's a decent find. I'll hold onto it if nobody's using it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_AEGIS_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6087 0 0}That armor appears sturdier than my current equipment. Would it be okay if I used it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_EQUIP_UPDATE_MULTI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Who should I give the[n]{f 4 4 1 0 1 0}...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_EQUIP_UPDATE_HERO_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've equipped the {f 4 4 1 0 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_YUKARI_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1039 0 0}Yes! Thanks, I'll take good care of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_JUNPEI_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}Aw yeah, upgrade time, baby! Let's keep it rollin'![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_SANADA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3042 0 0}There's no substitute for training, but I'll take solid gear where we can find it too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_MITSURU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4038 0 0}You have my gratitude. I won't let you down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_AEGIS_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6038 0 0}Equipment upgrade confirmed. I anticipate an improved combat performance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_AMADA_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7040 0 0}Thank you very much. I'll do my best to be of help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_ARAGAKI
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9051 0 0}Good choice. I'll see to it that you don't regret it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_EQUIP_UPDATE_AEGIS_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6039 0 0}Equipment upgrade confirmed. Now I'm sure to improve even further![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_TUTO_MITU_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm no longer getting a signal from the Shadow. It must be fairly far away...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_TUTO_MITU_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 50 0 0}Well, it got the chest, but at least it knows we're here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm sure it won't be able to ignore us if we keep opening treasure chests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}So let's keep looking for chests. We just might run into that Shadow again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_TUTO_FUKA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I don't sense the Shadow anymore. It's probably pretty far away by now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_TUTO_FUKA_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It got the treasure chest... but I think it noticed us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We should be able to get its attention if we keep opening chests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Let's keep looking for them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_BTL_MITU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}The Shadow's coming our way. Get ready![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_BTL_MITU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}The target Shadow has been eliminated. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}There aren't any Shadows left on this floor. Let's keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_BTL_FUKA_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}The Shadow's headed straight for us! This is our chance! Are you ready?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HIGH_RARE_BTL_FUKA_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It looks like you defeated the Shadow. Good job.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm not sensing any more enemies on this floor. Let's move on.[n]{f 1 1}
